question.text: Unabsorbed business loss from exchange-traded derivatives can be carried forward for:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Business losses can be carried forward for 8 assessment years and set off against business income in subsequent years. The return must be filed on time to claim carry forward. **The Trap:** This is from the workbook sample questions. 8 years is the limit. **Cross-Exam Context:** Carry forward rules are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Timely filing of return is mandatory — late filing forfeits the right to carry forward business losses.
